name: Source Fidelity review for Ssr Generation Methods bundle
summary: Accepted after checking the staged bibliographic metadata, source locators, method statements, and quantitative notes against the cited EPFL Infoscience, arXiv, ETS/MDPI, ACL Anthology, and previously published source records. Agent4Edu full-text details for dataset size, model versions, and top-line metrics were corrected before this review was recorded.

findings.claim_or_issue: The initial Agent4Edu artifact and finding described the extraction as abstract-level and left model/version and metric details unstaged, even though the arXiv HTML exposes those details.
findings.why_it_matters: Source-fidelity review should use the most specific accessible source locator before accepting method and metric claims.
findings.recommended_action: Corrections were applied to the Agent4Edu artifact and finding to stage EduData size, GPT-3.5-turbo/GPT-4-turbo model details, learner-simulation metrics, and the arXiv HTML source locator.
